text: Hey Nicky, just checking in. How are you doing? Haven't heard from you in a few days 😊
Hi Dad! Sorry been so busy with work. I'm good though! How are you and Mom?
We're well! Mom made your favourite jollof yesterday. Come visit soon okay? We miss you ❤️
Hey baby just thinking about you, how are you doing?
Aww hi mum 😊 I'm good just tired from work. Miss you though
Get some rest ok? Call me this weekend, I'll make your favourite if you come by 💛
yo Nikki, you doing anything Saturday? mum's asking if we're coming for lunch
ugh I forgot about that 😩 I was gonna go to Priya's thing but I can move it to the evening I guess
lol same, ok I'll tell her we're both coming. bring that jollof rice mum keeps asking you to make 😂
Nic!! Haven't heard from you in a while, how are you doing my love? 🥰
Auntie Em!! I know I know, things have been so hectic 😭 but I'm good! Miss you loads though
Aww come visit soon okay? I'll make your favourite 🍲 we need a proper catch up
girl are we still doing drinks friday or nah 👀
YES omg I've been thinking about it all week lol. that new rooftop bar?
obviously 😂 7pm? i'll grab us a table
hey nic you good? you've been in your room all day lol
omg yes sorry just been in my head a bit 😅 might come out for tea soon
kettle's on whenever you're ready babe, no rush 🫶
